testcase.name: test_log_missed_trade_with_commission

failure.message: AssertionError: Response: {'message': 'Trade logged successfully', 'trade': {'id': '68a36019-2635-4af4-9e79-2c13e7c574cf', 'user_id': 'b4628e3e-9dec-42ef-8c75-dcba08194cd2', 'lot_size': 1.5, 'direction': 'BUY', 'projected_profit': 22.5, 'actual_profit': 25.5, 'commission': 5.0, 'profit_difference': 3.0, 'performance': 'exceeded', 'signal_id': None, 'notes': 'Test trade with commission', 'is_retroactive': True, 'is_manual_adjustment': True, 'created_at': '2020-01-15T12:00:00+00:00'}} assert ('commission' in {'message': 'Trade logged successfully', 'trade': {'actual_profit': 25.5, 'commission': 5.0, 'created_at': '2020-01-15T12:00:00+00:00', 'direction': 'BUY', ...}} or 'trade_id' in {'message': 'Trade logged successfully', 'trade': {'actual_profit': 25.5, 'commission': 5.0, 'created_at': '2020-01-15T12:00:00+00:00', 'direction': 'BUY', ...}})

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_65_fixes.py:104: in test_log_missed_trade_with_commission assert "commission" in data or "trade_id" in data, f"Response: {data}" E AssertionError: Response: {'message': 'Trade logged successfully', 'trade': {'id': '68a36019-2635-4af4-9e79-2c13e7c574cf', 'user_id': 'b4628e3e-9dec-42ef-8c75-dcba08194cd2', 'lot_size': 1.5, 'direction': 'BUY', 'projected_profit': 22.5, 'actual_profit': 25.5, 'commission': 5.0, 'profit_difference': 3.0, 'performance': 'exceeded', 'signal_id': None, 'notes': 'Test trade with commission', 'is_retroactive': True, 'is_manual_adjustment': True, 'created_at': '2020-01-15T12:00:00+00:00'}} E assert ('commission' in {'message': 'Trade logged successfully', 'trade': {'actual_profit': 25.5, 'commission': 5.0, 'created_at': '2020-01-15T12:00:00+00:00', 'direction': 'BUY', ...}} or 'trade_id' in {'message': 'Trade logged successfully', 'trade': {'actual_profit': 25.5, 'commission': 5.0, 'created_at': '2020-01-15T12:00:00+00:00', 'direction': 'BUY', ...}})

testcase.name: test_licensee_projections_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_65_fixes.py:156: in test_licensee_projections_endpoint license_id = licenses[0]["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 0
